item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 22min It’s close. Cita Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 10h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this w
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 22min It’s close. Cita Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 10h Jordan Spieth through 36 holes this week: *1-under-par *0 bogeys *4 double bogeys
He is the only player over the last 20 years on the PGA Tour to be under par, have 4+ doubles and 0 bogeys through 36 holes in any tournament. 1 25 8 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h Jarringly ‘I’m in my 40s now’ moment to be walking a dog listening to the radio and thinkin
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h Jarringly ‘I’m in my 40s now’ moment to be walking a dog listening to the radio and thinking ‘Jack Savoretti sounds like a nice man, I wish him every success.’ 3 2 mil

item.title: Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 3h Am I the only one who's thinking that cue ball looks a bit yellow?? 804

item.title: TheShotgunStart: Kevin Van Valkenburg reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 17 abr. Mr. @TheRealPJClark finds himself back in t
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg reposteó The Shotgun Start @TheShotgunStart · 17 abr. Mr. @TheRealPJClark finds himself back in the Big Chair alongside @garrett_TFE as they recap an... interesting... last few days for LIV Golf.
Is the PIF invested past 2026? Will Bryson re-sign after this year? Are new sponsors enough to keep LIV alive? youtube.com The latest on LIV Golf: Will Saudi PIF continue funding after 2026? |... Mr. PJ finds himself in the "Big Chair" once again with Andy, Brendan, and KVV in Scotland this week! He's joined by Fried Egg Golf's Garrett Morrison, also ... 2 5 38 48 mil
